track_label: Synthesis (keep winning architecture, selectively incorporate proven helpers)

regression_check_against_loop_01_tests.command: loop-01's unmodified test_parser.py run against loop-02's parser.py in a throwaway subdir

improvements_from_loop01_evidence.change: ParseError now exposes a .reason attribute (bare cause); message text and all other attributes unchanged
Committed regression tests pinning the winner's deliberate ASCII-only structural-whitespace behavior for Unicode-whitespace-only lines (surfaced by loop-01 union testing); no behavior change

stop_reason: Synthesis Track plan called for exactly two Loops. loop-02 made two measured, behavior-safe improvements driven by loop-01 evidence (ParseError.reason and pinned Unicode-whitespace behavior) with zero regression and all hard gates green; promoted to final/ as synthesis champion.
